root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: *: vendor tool migrate to glide.
